task_completion.description: Create a new artificial origin in scolv with the provided parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scolv GUI should be open, showing an 'Artificial Origin' dialog or an uncommitted origin with Latitude 37.498, Longitude 137.242, Depth 10 km, and Time 2024-01-01 07:10:09.5 UTC.

task_completion.description: Commit the newly created origin to the SeisComP system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scolv GUI should show the origin has been committed, typically visible in the Event list or Origin list, or a 'Commit' button being clicked.

task_completion.description: Compute magnitudes using archived waveform data from the GE network.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scolv 'Magnitudes' tab should be open, displaying loaded waveform traces (from the GE network) and calculated station magnitude values.

task_completion.description: Commit the computed magnitudes to the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scolv GUI should show a committed network magnitude (NetMag) of at least 7.0 in the event summary or magnitude view.

task_completion.description: Export the complete event data to '~/recovered_event.xml'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing a command like 'scxmldump' exporting to '/home/ga/recovered_event.xml', or a file manager/terminal showing the 'recovered_event.xml' file exists in the home directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SeisComP (scolv) graphical interface to process the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual scolv application windows being interacted with, not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually loaded and used real waveform data for magnitude computation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Waveform traces must be visibly rendered in the scolv picker or magnitude windows. The agent should not just manually type a magnitude value.

integrity.description: Verify the XML file was generated by the system, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export should be performed via a SeisComP utility (e.g., scxmldump in the terminal) or a GUI export feature, rather than the agent writing XML tags manually in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected origin parameters are Latitude: 37.498, Longitude: 137.242, Depth: 10 km. The computed magnitude should be >= 7.0. The final exported file must be exactly at /home/ga/recovered_event.xml.
